_doc: Machine-readable RUNTIME witness-diversity policy. Consumed by the runtime verifier. SEPARATE from the governance admission contract docs/governance/admission_policy.json (who may BE a witness) — do not conflate. Human-readable companion: docs/security/witness-diversity.md. Fails closed if quorum unsatisfied or any key is a placeholder.

witnesses.name: auths-dev-us-west
witnesses.notes: Bootstrap witness. Must be joined by >=2 independent operators before this policy can be satisfied. Loading this policy fails closed until the placeholder key is replaced.
